sentences.arabic: ذَهَبْتُ إِلَى السُّوقِ الشَّعْبِيِّ فِي وَسَطِ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Otišao sam na narodnu pijacu u centru grada.
sentences.translationEn: I went to the local market in the city centre.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ السُّوقُ مَلِيئًا بِالنَّاسِ وَالْبَضَائِعِ الْمُتَنَوِّعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Pijaca je bila puna ljudi i raznovrsne robe.
sentences.translationEn: The market was full of people and varied goods.

sentences.translation: Vidio sam začine, odjeću i ručne radove.
sentences.translationEn: I saw spices, clothing, and handmade crafts.

sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَيْتُ بَعْضَ الْهَدَايَا لِأَهْلِي بِأَسْعَارٍ مُعْقُولَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Kupio sam neke poklone za porodicu po razumnim cijenama.
sentences.translationEn: I bought some gifts for my family at reasonable prices.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ زِيَارَةُ السُّوقِ تَجْرِبَةً رَائِعَةً لِلتَّعَرُّفِ عَلَى ثَقَافَةِ الْمَكَانِ.
sentences.translation: Posjeta pijaci bila je divno iskustvo za upoznavanje kulture tog mjesta.
sentences.translationEn: Visiting the market was a wonderful experience for getting to know the local culture.
